sessions.title: Registration & Welcome Coffee
sessions.description: Check-in, collect your conference badge and materials. Network over coffee and light breakfast.

sessions.title: Opening Ceremony & Keynote
sessions.speaker: Dr. Amina Wanjiru
sessions.description: Welcome address and opening keynote on 'The Future of AI in Africa: Opportunities and Challenges'

sessions.title: Track A: NLP for African Languages
sessions.speaker: Multiple Speakers
sessions.description: Research presentations on natural language processing for low-resource African languages. 4 paper presentations.

sessions.title: Track B: Computer Vision Applications
sessions.speaker: Prof. David Odhiambo
sessions.description: Computer vision for agriculture, healthcare, and wildlife conservation. Live demos included.

sessions.title: Workshop: Deep Learning with PyTorch
sessions.speaker: Dr. Mariam Nduta
sessions.description: Hands-on workshop building neural networks from scratch. Bring your laptop!

sessions.title: Panel: AI Ethics in Africa
sessions.speaker: Dr. Zainab Abiola & Others
sessions.description: Expert panel discussion on responsible AI deployment, bias, and governance frameworks for Africa.

sessions.title: Keynote: Healthcare AI
sessions.speaker: Dr. Fatima Hassan
sessions.description: AI-powered diagnostics for low-resource healthcare settings

sessions.title: AI for Healthcare Symposium
sessions.description: Specialized symposium on medical AI applications in Africa

sessions.title: Lunch & Poster Session
sessions.description: View 50+ research posters while enjoying lunch

sessions.title: Workshop: Building NLP Models for African Languages
sessions.speaker: Dr. Amina Wanjiru
sessions.description: Learn to build NLP models for Swahili, Yoruba, and other African languages

sessions.title: Women in AI Kenya Meetup
sessions.description: Networking and mentorship event for women in AI

sessions.title: Evening Reception & Networking
sessions.description: Cocktail reception with live music and city views

sessions.title: AI Startup Pitch Competition
sessions.description: 10 African AI startups compete for $20,000 in prizes

sessions.title: Track C: Reinforcement Learning & Optimization
sessions.speaker: Dr. Michael Otieno
sessions.description: Latest research in RL applications for energy, logistics, and finance

sessions.title: Lunch & Career Fair
sessions.description: Meet with companies hiring AI talent across Africa

sessions.title: Workshop: Deploying ML Models in Production
sessions.speaker: James Kimani
sessions.description: Best practices for taking your ML models from research to production

sessions.title: Closing Keynote & Awards
sessions.speaker: Samuel Mwangi
sessions.description: Conference wrap-up, best paper awards, and future of IndabaX Kenya

sessions.title: Closing Remarks & Group Photo
sessions.description: Final words and official conference photo
